description_long: This is a rectangular, two-story school building with a flat black roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features a central entrance with a set of stairs leading up to double doors, flanked by large windows arranged in a grid pattern. The exterior walls are clad in light gray panels with horizontal and vertical accents in reddish-brown, giving the building a modern institutional appearance. The side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and repeating vertical accent stripes. The rear of the building is lined with evenly spaced windows, suggesting classrooms or offices along a central corridor. The structure appears robust and functional, typical of mid- to late-20th-century educational architecture.
description: A modern, rectangular two-story school building with a flat roof, central entrance, and grid-like window arrangement in gray and reddish-brown tones.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with stairs, double doors, and a symmetrical arrangement of windows and reddish-brown accents.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a narrow facade with two vertical window columns and accent stripes, emphasizing the building's length.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a long wall with a continuous row of windows and minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with two window columns and vertical accent stripes.
